title: Bond Ordinances Ready — Revised Schedule for City-Owned Buildings
summary: Council reviews items 11-28 including multiple bond ordinances. Jimmy Monto (presenting for Dr. Chol Majok) confirms items 11-26 are ready, noting a revised schedule for city-owned buildings on items 15/16. Hanah Ehrenreich confirms item 28 is also ready. Items include the DPW Dig Once Streetscape ($245K) and CHIPS Reimbursable Sidewalk projects.
